blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,447 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
